videos.headline: Dortmund back into top four after victory over Frankfurt
videos.title: Dortmund back into top four after victory over Frankfurt
videos.caption: Borussia Dortmund come from behind to beat Eintracht Frankfurt 3-1 and move back up into the Bundesliga top four.
videos.description: Borussia Dortmund come from behind to beat Eintracht Frankfurt 3-1 and move back up into the Bundesliga top four.

videos.headline: Leipzig edges 10-man Dortmund in Bundesliga classic
videos.title: Leipzig edges 10-man Dortmund in Bundesliga classic
videos.caption: RB Leipzig gets the 3-2 win over Borussia Dortmund after Mats Hummels saw red early on.
videos.description: RB Leipzig gets the 3-2 win over Borussia Dortmund after Mats Hummels saw red early on.

videos.headline: Mats Hummels is sent off for Dortmund following a harsh challenge

videos.headline: Dortmund come alive in second half to beat Union Berlin
videos.title: Dortmund come alive in second half to beat Union Berlin
videos.caption: Nico Schlotterbeck, Julian Brandt and Julian Ryerson all score in the second half to propel Dortmund past Union Berlin.

videos.headline: Dortmund cruise over Frankfurt to move to top of the table
videos.title: Dortmund cruise over Frankfurt to move to top of the table
videos.caption: Borussia Dortmund get a goal from Jude Bellingham, Mats Hummels and two from Donyell Malen to pick up the 4-0 win over Eintracht Frankfurt.

videos.headline: Excellent passing leads to a Dortmund third
videos.title: Excellent passing leads to a Dortmund third
